title: change repo description
body: Repository description isn't accurate anymore since skopeo is about to be able to download image's layers in addition to inspect images on a repository

comments.body: Yes lets rewrite this to skopeo is a mechanism to work with remote registries including retrieving information, images, signing content.
Problem is I can't edit that, probably Jhon can
seems like I gathered sufficient privileges to edit it, I'll to it asap
